tooling_sandboxing.detail: A cross-harness marketplace of agent/skill/command markdown definitions installed into the host tool (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Copilot); it has no execution or isolation layer of its own — that's entirely delegated to whichever harness runs it.

context_memory.detail: Skills use a progressive-disclosure pattern (SKILL.md kept under 8KB for navigation, with references/ material loaded on demand) that scopes which skill/tool content enters context — this manages the tool surface, not conversation memory.

lifecycle_hooks.detail: No callback or interception system is documented; installation only wires markdown agent/skill/command files into the host harness's own discovery mechanism.

prompt_optimization.detail: Each of the 203 agents and 175 skills is a markdown file with YAML frontmatter (name/description/model/tools) plus a freeform instructions body that users select, install, and can edit or fork locally — no automatic tuning loop.

build_vs_buy.label: blueprint
build_vs_buy.detail: A config-driven plugin/skill marketplace (94 plugins, 203 agents, 175 skills) you install into an existing harness rather than a library you import or a hosted service.
